name: Harvest Apple Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Apples; finely chopped and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugars until light.
2. Beat in vanilla extract and eggs.
3. Combine the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Stir into the butter mixture.
5. Batter will be very thick. Stir in chopped apples, combining all ingredients well.
6. Pour batter into a greased 4x12 inch loaf pan.
7. In a separate saucepan, combine 2 tbsp Butter or margarine, 3 tbsp Brown sugar, 1 tsp Cinnamon, and 1/3 cup Almonds (finely chopped).
8. Stir over low heat until the mixture begins to bubble.
9. Spread the streusel mixture over the batter.
10. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes. Lower the heat to 350°F and bake an additional 30-35 minutes.
11. Test with a toothpick. Remove the pan from the oven and let cool on a rack for 10 minutes.
12. Remove from the pan and continue to cool on the rack.
Peel and chop apples immediately before adding them to the batter to prevent browning.
